info.description: Enphase Energy, Inc. is a global energy technology company, which engages in the business of designing, developing, manufacturing, and selling home energy solutions that manage energy generation, energy storage, control, and communications on one intelligent platform. It operates through the following geographical segments: the United States, the Netherlands, and Others. The company was founded by Raghuveer R. Belur and Martin Fornage in March 2006 and is headquartered in Fremont, CA.
info.description_zh: Enphase Energy, Inc.是一家全球能源技術公司，從事設計、開發、製造和銷售家庭能源解決方案的業務，這些解決方案在一個智慧平台上管理能源產生、能源儲存、控制和通訊。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、荷蘭和其他地區。該公司由 Raghuveer R. Belur 和 Martin Fornage 於 2006 年 3 月創立，總部位於加州弗里蒙特。

info.description: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc. engages in the development of energy technology, which provides inverter solutions. The firm operates through the following segments: Solar and All Other. The Solar segment includes the design, development, manufacturing, and sales of an inverter solution designed to maximize power generation. The All Other segment includes the design, development, manufacturing and sales of UPS products, energy storage products, e-Mobility products, and automated machines. Its products and services include photovoltaic inverters, power optimizers, photovoltaic monitoring, software tools, and electric vehicle chargers. The company was founded by Guy Sella, Lior Handelsman, Yoav Galin, Meir Adest, and Amir Fishelov on August 7, 2006 and is headquartered in Herzliya, Israel.
info.description_zh: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc. 從事能源技術開發，提供逆變器解決方案。該公司透過以下部門運作：太陽能部門和所有其他部門。太陽能部門包括旨在最大限度提高發電量的逆變器解決方案的設計、開發、製造和銷售。所有其他部門包括 UPS 產品、儲能產品、電動交通產品和自動化機器的設計、開發、製造和銷售。其產品和服務包括光伏逆變器、功率優化器、光伏監控、軟體工具和電動車充電器。該公司由 Guy Sella、Lior Handelsman、Yoav Galin、Meir Adest 和 Amir Fishelov 於 2006 年 8 月 7 日創立，總部位於以色列荷茲利亞。

info.description: POET Technologies, Inc. engages in the designing, developing, manufacturing and sale of opto-electronic solutions for the sensing, data communications and telecommunications markets. It developed POET Optical Interposer platform, which allows the integration of electronic and photonic devices into a single multi-chip module. The company was founded on November 14, 1985 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
info.description_zh: POET Technologies, Inc. 從事感測、數據通訊和電信市場的光電解決方案的設計、開發、製造和銷售。它開發了 POET 光學中介層平台，允許將電子和光子裝置整合到單一多晶片模組中。該公司成立於1985年11月14日，總部位於加拿大多倫多。

info.description: Zebra Technologies Corp. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of automatic identification and data capture products. Its products include mobile computers, barcode scanners, radio frequency identification devices readers, specialty printers for barcode labeling and personal identification, real-time location systems, accessories and supplies, such as self-adhesive labels and other consumables, and software utilities and applications. It also provides services such as maintenance, technical support, repair, and managed and professional services, including cloud-based subscriptions. It operates through Asset Intelligence and Tracking and Enterprise Visibility and Mobility segments. The Asset Intelligence and Tracking segment is involved in barcode and card printing, location solutions, supplies, and services. The Enterprise Visibility and Mobility segment focuses on mobile computing, data capture, and RFID. The company was founded by Edward L. Kaplan and Gerhard Cless in 1969 and is headquartered in Lincolnshire, IL.
info.description_zh: Zebra Technologies Corp. 從事自動辨識和資料擷取產品的設計、製造和銷售。其產品包括行動數據終端、條碼掃描器、無線射頻識別設備讀取器、條碼標籤和個人識別專用印表機、即時定位系統、配件和耗材（例如不乾膠標籤和其他耗材）以及軟體實用程式和應用程式。它還提供維護、技術支援、維修以及託管和專業服務等服務，包括基於雲端的訂閱。它透過資產智慧和追蹤以及企業可見性和移動性部門進行運作。資產智慧和追蹤部門涉及條碼和卡片列印、定位解決方案、用品和服務。企業可視性和移動性部分專注於行動運算、資料擷取和 RFID。該公司由 Edward L. Kaplan 和 Gerhard Cless 於 1969 年創立，總部位於伊利諾伊州林肯郡。

info.description: Nextpower, Inc. engages in the provision of integrated solar tracker and software solutions used in utility-scale and ground-mounted distributed generation solar projects. Its products enable solar panels in utility-scale power plants to follow the sun's movement across the sky and optimize plant performance. The company was founded by Daniel S. Shugar, Alexander Au, Nicholas Miller, Michael Mehavich, Marco Garcia, and Tyroan Hardy in 2013 and is headquartered in Fremont, CA.
info.description_zh: Nextpower, Inc. 致力於提供用於公用事業規模和地面分散式發電太陽能專案的整合式太陽能追蹤器和軟體解決方案。其產品使公用事業規模發電廠中的太陽能電池板能夠跟隨太陽在天空中的運動並優化發電廠性能。該公司由 Daniel S. Shugar、Alexander Au、Nicholas Miller、Michael Mehavich、Marco Garcia 和 Tyroan Hardy 於 2013 年創立，總部位於加州弗里蒙特。

info.description: Direxion Daily Nvda Bull 1.5X Shares seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 150% of the daily performance of NVDA. The fund, under normal circumstances, invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the securities of NVDA and financial instruments, such as swap agreements and options, that provide leveraged exposure to NVDA. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Direxion Daily Nvda Bull 1.5X Shares 尋求每日投資績效（未計費用和開支）為 NVDA 每日表現的 150%。在正常情況下，該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於 NVDA 的證券以及為 NVDA 提供槓桿敞口的金融工具，例如掉期協議和選擇權。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: GraniteShares 1.5x Long NVDA Daily ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 1.5 times (150%) the daily percentage change of the common stock of NVIDIA Corporation. The fund will enter into one or more swap agreements with major financial institutions for a specified period ranging from a day to more than one year whereby the fund and the financial institution will agree to exchange the return (or differentials in rates of return) earned or realized on the Underlying Stock. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: GraniteShares 1.5 倍多頭 NVDA 每日 ETF 尋求每日投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為 NVIDIA 公司普通股每日百分比變化的 1.5 倍 (150%)。基金將與主要金融機構簽訂一項或多項互換協議，期限從一天到一年以上不等，根據該協議，基金和金融機構將同意交換標的股票賺取或實現的回報（或回報率差異）。它是非多元化的。

info.description: Array Technologies, Inc. manufactures ground-mounting systems used in solar energy projects. The company sells its products to engineering, procurement and construction firms that build solar energy projects and to large solar developers, independent power producers and utilities, master supply agreements or multi-year procurement contracts. It has offices in Europe, Central America, and Australia. The company's products include DuraTrack and SmarTrack. Array Technologies was founded by Ronald P. Corio in 1989 and is headquartered in Albuquerque, NM.
info.description_zh: Array Technologies, Inc. 生產用於太陽能專案的地面安裝系統。該公司將其產品銷售給建造太陽能專案的工程、採購和建築公司，以及大型太陽能開發商、獨立電力生產商和公用事業公司、主供應協議或多年採購合約。它在歐洲、中美洲和澳洲設有辦事處。該公司的產品包括DuraTrack和SmarTrack。 Array Technologies 由 Ronald P. Corio 於 1989 年創立，總部位於新墨西哥州阿爾伯克基。

info.description: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings, Inc. engages in providing home care services to patients. It operates through the following business segments: Private Duty Services (PDS), Home Health & Hospice (HHH), and Medical Solutions (MS). The PDS segment includes private duty nursing services. The HHH segment provides home health, hospice, and program services to predominately elderly populations. The MS segment offers supplies to patients requiring enteral nutrition services or respiratory care. The company was founded on November 30, 2016 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings, Inc. 致力於為患者提供家庭護理服務。該公司透過以下業務部門運作：私人值班服務 (PDS)、家庭健康和臨終關懷 (HHH) 以及醫療解決方案 (MS)。 PDS 部門包括私人護理服務。 HHH 部門主要為老年人提供家庭健康、臨終關懷和計畫服務。 MS 部門為需要腸內營養服務或呼吸照護的患者提供用品。該公司成立於2016年11月30日，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: Gen Digital, Inc. engages in the provision of security, storage, and systems management solutions. The firm focuses on providing consumer cyber safety with its business solutions. Its brands include Norton, Avast, Lifelock, Avira, AVG, and CCleaner. The company was founded by Gary Hendrix in April 1982 and is headquartered in Tempe, AZ.
info.description_zh: Gen Digital, Inc. 致力於提供安全性、儲存和系統管理解決方案。該公司專注於透過其業務解決方案提供消費者網路安全。其品牌包括 Norton、Avast、Lifelock、Avi​​ra、AVG 和 CCleaner。該公司由 Gary Hendrix 於 1982 年 4 月創立，總部位於亞利桑那州坦佩。

info.description: JD.com, Inc. is a technology-driven E-commerce company, which engages in the sale of electronics products and general merchandise products, including audio, video products, and books. It operates in the following segments: JD Retail, JD Logistics, and New Businesses. The JD Retail segment offers online retail, online marketplace, and marketing services. The JD Logistics segment includes internal and external logistics businesses. The New Businesses segment is composed of JD Property, Jingxi, overseas businesses and technology initiatives. The company was founded on June 18, 1998, by Qiang Dong Liu and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
info.description_zh: 京東公司是一家技術驅動型電子商務公司，從事電子產品和百貨產品（包括音訊、視訊產品和書籍）的銷售。其業務分為以下幾個部分：京東零售、京東物流和新業務。京東零售部門提供線上零售、線上市場和行銷服務。京東物流業務包括內部物流業務及外部物流業務。新業務板塊由京東地產、京西、海外業務和科技業務組成。該公司由劉強東於1998年6月18日創立，總部位於中國北京。

info.description: Costco Wholesale Corp. engages in the provision of operation of membership warehouses through wholly owned subsidiaries. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States, Canada, and Other International Operations. The company was founded by James D. Sinegal and Jeffrey H. Brotman in 1983 and is headquartered in Issaquah, WA.
info.description_zh: Costco Wholesale Corp.透過全資子公司從事會員倉庫經營業務。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、加拿大和其他國際業務。該公司由 James D. Sinegal 和 Jeffrey H. Brotman 於 1983 年創立，總部位於華盛頓州伊瑟闊。

info.description: Achieve Life Sciences, Inc. is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company, which engages in the development and commercialization of cytisinicline for smoking cessation. Its products includes cytisine, a plant-based alkaloid with a binding affinity to the nicotinic acetylcholine receptor. The company was founded in October 1991 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
info.description_zh: Achieve Life Sciences, Inc.是一家臨床階段的製藥公司，致力於戒菸用金雀花鹼的開發和商業化。其產品包括金雀花鹼，一種與菸鹼乙醯膽鹼受體具有結合親和力的植物生物鹼。該公司成立於1991年10月，總部位於加拿大溫哥華。

info.description: The Wendy's Co. engages in operating, developing, and franchising a system of quick-service restaurants. It operates through the following segments: Wendy's U.S., Wendy's International, and Global Real Estate and Development. The Wendy's U.S. segment includes the operation and franchising of Wendy's restaurants in the U.S. The Wendy's International segment is involved in the operation and franchising of Wendy's restaurants in countries and territories other than the U.S. The Global Real Estate and Development segment focuses on real estate activity for owned sites and sites leased from third parties. The company was founded by R. David Thomas on November 15, 1969 and is headquartered in Dublin, OH.
info.description_zh: The Wendy's Co. 從事快餐店系統的營運、開發和特許經營。該公司透過以下部門營運：Wendy's U.S.、Wendy's International 和 Global Real Estate and Development。 Wendy's 美國分部包括 Wendy's 餐廳在美國的經營和特許經營。 Wendy's International 分部參與 Wendy's 餐廳在美國以外的國家和地區的經營和特許經營。全球房地產和開發分部專注於自有場地和從第三方租賃的場地的房地產活動。該公司由 R. David Thomas 於 1969 年 11 月 15 日創立，總部位於俄亥俄州都柏林。

info.description: Tower Semiconductor Ltd. engages in providing semiconductor solutions. It also offers technology and manufacturing platforms for integrated circuits (ICs) in growing markets such as consumer, industrial, automotive, mobile, infrastructure, medical, and aerospace and defense. It focuses on creating positive and sustainable impact on the world through long term partnerships and its advanced and innovative analog technology offering, comprised of a broad range of customizable process platforms such as SiGe, BiCMOS, mixed-signal/CMOS, RF CMOS, CMOS image sensor, non-imaging sensors, integrated power management (BCD and 700V), and MEMS. Its designs enable a quick and accurate design cycle as well as process transfer services including development, transfer, and optimization, to IDMs and fabless companies. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Migdal Haemek, Israel.
info.description_zh: Tower Semiconductor Ltd. 致力於提供半導體解決方案。它還為消費、工業、汽車、移動、基礎設施、醫療、航空航太和國防等不斷增長的市場中的積體電路 (IC) 提供技術和製造平台。它專注於透過長期合作夥伴關係及其先進和創新的類比技術產品對世界產生積極和可持續的影響，該技術產品由廣泛的可自訂製程平台組成，例如 SiGe、BiCMOS、混合訊號/CMOS、RF CMOS、CMOS 影像感測器、非影像感測器、整合電源管理（BCD 和 700V）和 MEMS。其設計為 IDM 和無晶圓廠公司提供快速、準確的設計週期以及包括開發、轉移和優化在內的流程轉移服務。該公司成立於1993年，總部位於以色列Migdal Haemek。

info.description: Coherent Corp. engages in the development, refinement, manufacturing, and marketing of engineered materials, opto-electronic components and devices, and lasers for use in the industrial, communications, electronics, and instrumentation markets. It operates through the following segments: Networking, Materials, and Lasers. The Networking segment leverages compound semiconductor technology platforms and deep knowledge of end-user applications. The Materials segment markets engineered materials and optoelectronic devices. The Lasers segment serves industrial customers in semiconductor capital equipment, display capital equipment, precision manufacturing, and aerospace and defense, as well as instrumentation customers in life sciences and scientific research. The company was founded by Carl J. Johnson in 1971 and is headquartered in Saxonburg, PA.
info.description_zh: Coherent Corp. 從事工業、通訊、電子和儀器儀表市場使用的工程材料、光電元件和設備以及雷射的開發、精煉、製造和行銷。它透過以下部門運作：網路、材料和雷射。網路部門利用複合半導體技術平台和對最終用戶應用的深入了解。材料部門銷售工程材料和光電設備。雷射部門為半導體資本設備、顯示資本設備、精密製造、航空航太和國防領域的工業客戶以及生命科學和科學研究領域的儀器儀表客戶提供服務。該公司由 Carl J. Johnson 於 1971 年創立，總部位於賓夕法尼亞州薩克森堡。

info.description: The AES Corp. engages in the provision of power generation and utility services through its renewable and thermal generation facilities and distribution businesses. It operates through the following segments: U.S. and Utilities Strategic Business Unit (SBU), South America SBU, MCAC SBU, Eurasia SBU. The U.S. and Utilities SBU segment consists of facilities in the United States, Puerto Rico and El Salvador. The South America SBU segment covers Chile, Colombia, Argentina, and Brazil. The MCAC SBU segment refers to Mexico, Central America, and the Caribbean. The Eurasia SBU segment handles operations in Europe and Asia. The company was founded by Dennis W. Bakke and Roger W. Sant in 1981 and is headquartered in Arlington, VA.
info.description_zh: AES Corp. 透過其再生能源和火力發電設施及分銷業務提供發電和公用事業服務。它透過以下部門運作：美國和公用事業戰略業務部門 (SBU)、南美洲 SBU、MCAC SBU、歐亞大陸 SBU。美國和公用事業 SBU 部門由位於美國、波多黎各和薩爾瓦多的設施組成。南美SBU業務涵蓋智利、哥倫比亞、阿根廷和巴西。 MCAC SBU 部門涉及墨西哥、中美洲和加勒比地區。歐亞 SBU 部門負責歐洲和亞洲的業務。該公司由 Dennis W. Bakke 和 Roger W. Sant 於 1981 年創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州阿靈頓。

info.description: Texas Roadhouse, Inc. is a full-service, casual dining restaurant chain, which offers assorted seasoned and aged steaks hand-cut daily on the premises and cooked to order over open gas-fired grills. It operates through the following segments: Texas Roadhouse, Bubba's 33, and Other. The Texas Roadhouse segment offers steaks, ribs, seafood, chicken, pork chops, pulled pork and vegetable plates, and an assortment of hamburgers, salads, and sandwiches. The Bubba's 33 segment refers to the family-friendly restaurant concept featuring scratch-made food for all with a little rock 'n' roll, ice-cold beer, and signature drinks. The Other segment includes the results of the domestic company Jaggers restaurants and the results of retail initiatives. The company was founded by Wayne Kent Taylor on February 17, 1993 and is headquartered in Louisville, KY.
info.description_zh: Texas Roadhouse, Inc. 是一家提供全方位服务的休闲连锁餐厅，提供每天在店内手工切割并在开放式燃气烤架上现点现做的各种调味和陈年牛排。它透過以下部門運作：Texas Roadhouse、Bubba's 33 和其他部門。 Texas Roadhouse 部门提供牛排、排骨、海鲜、鸡肉、猪排、手撕猪肉和蔬菜拼盘，以及各种汉堡包、沙拉和三明治。 Bubba 的 33 部分体现了适合家庭的餐厅概念，为所有人提供现做的食物，还有一点摇滚乐、冰镇啤酒和招牌饮料。其他部分包括國內公司 Jaggers 餐廳的業績和零售計劃的業績。該公司由 Wayne Kent Taylor 於 1993 年 2 月 17 日創立，總部位於肯塔基州路易斯維爾。

info.description: Telefonaktiebolaget LM Ericsson engages in the provision of telecommunications equipment and related services to mobile and fixed network operators. It operates through the following segments: Networks, Cloud Software, Services, Enterprise, and Other. The Networks segment supports all radio-access technologies and offers hardware, software and related services for both radio access and transport. The Cloud Software segment offers solutions for core networks, business and operational support systems, network design and optimization, and managed network services. The Other segment refers to the media business and other non-allocated business. Segment-level information has also been presented to Other. The company was founded by Lars Magnus Ericsson in 1876 and is headquartered in Kista, Sweden.
info.description_zh: Telefonaktiebolaget LM 愛立信致力於為行動和固定網路業者提供電信設備及相關服務。它透過以下部門運作：網路、雲端軟體、服務、企業和其他。網路部門支援所有無線電存取技術，並為無線電存取和傳輸提供硬體、軟體和相關服務。雲端軟體部門提供核心網路、業務和營運支援系統、網路設計和最佳化以及託管網路服務的解決方案。其他分部是指媒體業務和其他非分配業務。段級資訊也已提交給其他人。該公司由 Lars Magnus Ericsson 於 1876 年創立，總部位於瑞典希斯塔。

info.description: EchoStar Corp. engages in the design, development, and distribution of digital set-top boxes and products for direct-to-home satellite service providers. It operates through the following business segments: Pay-TV, Retail Wireless, and Broadband and Satellite Services. The Pay-TV segment business strategy is to be the best provider of video services in the United States by providing products with the best technology, outstanding customer service, and great value. The Retail Wireless segment offers Retail Wireless services as well as a competitive portfolio of wireless devices. The Broadband and Satellite Services segment business strategy is to maintain and improve leadership position and competitive advantage through development of technologies and services marketed to selected sectors within the consumer, enterprise and government markets globally. The company was founded by Charlie William Ergen, Candy Ergen, and James DeFranco in 1980 and is headquartered in Englewood, CO.
info.description_zh: EchoStar Corp. 為直接到戶衛星服務供應商設計、開發和分銷數位機上盒和產品。它透過以下業務部門運作：付費電視、零售無線以及寬頻和衛星服務。付費電視部門的業務策略是透過提供具有最佳技術、出色的客戶服務和巨大價值的產品，成為美國最好的視訊服務供應商。零售無線部門提供零售無線服務以及具競爭力的無線設備組合。寬頻和衛星服務部門的商業策略是透過開發向全球消費者、企業和政府市場中選定部門銷售的技術和服務來維持和提高領導地位和競爭優勢。該公司由 Charlie William Ergen、Candy Ergen 和 James DeFranco 於 1980 年創立，總部位於科羅拉多州恩格爾伍德。

info.description: Exxon Mobil Corp. engages in the exploration, development, and distribution of oil, gas, and petroleum products. It operates through the following segments: Upstream, Energy Products, Chemical Products, and Specialty Products. The Upstream segment organizes the exploration of crude oil and natural gas. The Energy Products segment includes fuels, aromatics, and catalyst and licensing. The Chemical Products segment offers petrochemicals. The Specialty Products segment provides finished lubricants, basestocks and waxes, synthetics, and elastomers and resins. The company was founded by John D. Rockefeller in 1882 and is headquartered in Spring, TX.
info.description_zh: 埃克森美孚公司從事石油、天然氣和石油產品的勘探、開發和分銷。它透過以下部門運作：上游部門、能源產品部門、化學產品部門和特殊產品部門。上游部門組織原油和天然氣的勘探。能源產品部門包括燃料、芳烴、催化劑和許可。化學產品部門提供石化產品。特種產品部門提供成品潤滑劑、基礎油和蠟、合成材料、彈性體和樹脂。該公司由約翰·D·洛克菲勒 (John D. Rockefeller) 於 1882 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州斯普林。

info.description: HighPeak Energy, Inc. is an independent oil and natural gas company, which engages in the acquisition, development and production of oil, natural gas and NGL reserves. The company's assets are primarily located in the Howard County area of the Midland Basin. The company was founded on October 29, 2019 and is headquartered in Fort Worth, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: HighPeak Energy, Inc.是一家獨立的石油和天然氣公司，從事石油、天然氣和液化天然氣儲量的收購、開發和生產。該公司的資產主要位於米德蘭盆地的霍華德縣地區。該公司成立於2019年10月29日，總部位於德克薩斯州沃斯堡。

info.description: Procure Space ETF seeks investment results that correspond generally to the performance, before the fund's fees and expenses, of an equity index called the "S-Network Space Index". The fund invests, under normal circumstances, at least 80% of its net assets in companies of the underlying index that receive at least 50% of their revenues or profits from space-related businesses. The underlying index is designed to serve as an equity benchmark for a globally traded portfolio of companies that are engaged in space-related business, such as those utilizing satellite technology. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Procure Space ETF 尋求的投資結果通常與名為「S-Network Space Index」的股票指數（扣除基金費用和支出之前）的表現相對應。在正常情況下，該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產投資於相關指數中至少 50% 的收入或利潤來自太空相關業務的公司。該指數旨在作為從事太空相關業務（例如利用衛星技術的公司）的全球交易公司投資組合的股票基準。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Skywater Technology, Inc. is a holding company. It engages in the provision of semiconductor development, manufacturing services, and packaging services. The company was founded on October 3, 2016 and is headquartered in Bloomington, MN.
info.description_zh: Skywater Technology, Inc. 是一家控股公司。它從事提供半導體開發、製造服務和封裝服務。該公司成立於2016年10月3日，總部位於明尼蘇達州布魯明頓。

info.description: EquipmentShare.com, Inc. is a digitally-native equipment rental platform servicing the largest jobsites nationwide. It operates through the following segments: Equipment Rental and Services Operations, and Equipment Sales. The Equipment Rental and Services Operations segment engages in recurring activities at full-service branch locations, including equipment rentals and related services, as well as the sale of parts, supplies, and maintenance services. The Equipment Sales segment engages in the sale of new and used equipment through branch locations and dealership sites, including sales to participants in the OWN Program. The company was founded by Jabbok Schlacks and William J. Schlacks IV in 2014 and is headquartered in Columbia, MO.
info.description_zh: EquipmentShare.com, Inc. 是一個數位原生設備租賃平台，為全國最大的工作場所提供服務。它透過以下部門運作：設備租賃和服務營運以及設備銷售。設備租賃和服務營運部門在全方位服務分公司從事經常性活動，包括設備租賃和相關服務，以及零件、用品和維護服務的銷售。設備銷售部門透過分公司和經銷商站點從事新設備和二手設備的銷售，包括向 OWN 計畫參與者的銷售。該公司由 Jabbok Schlacks 和 William J. Schlacks IV 於 2014 年創立，總部位於密蘇裡州哥倫比亞。

info.description: Ford Motor Co. engages in the manufacture, distribution, and sale of automobiles. It operates through the following segments: Ford Blue, Ford Model E, Ford Pro, Ford Credit, and Corporate Other. The Ford Blue, Ford Model E, and Ford Pro segment includes the sale of Ford and Lincoln vehicles, service parts, and accessories, together with the associated costs to develop, manufacture, distribute, and service the vehicles, parts, and accessories. The Ford Credit segment consists of the Ford Credit business on a consolidated basis, which is primarily vehicle-related financing and leasing activities. The Corporate Other segment refers to corporate governance expenses, past service pension and OPEB income and expense, interest income and gains and losses from cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities, and foreign exchange derivatives gains, and losses associated with intercompany lending. The company was founded by Henry Ford on June 16, 1903 and is headquartered in Dearborn, MI.
info.description_zh: 福特汽車公司從事汽車的製造、分銷和銷售。該公司透過以下部門營運：Ford Blue、Ford Model E、Ford Pro、Ford Credit 和 Corporate Other。福特 Blue、福特 Model E 和福特 Pro 部門包括福特和林肯車輛、維修零件和配件的銷售，以及開發、製造、分銷和維修車輛、零件和配件的相關成本。福特信貸部門由合併後的福特信貸業務組成，主要從事與車輛相關的融資和租賃活動。公司其他部分是指公司治理費用、過去的服務退休金和 OPEB 收入和費用、利息收入以及現金、現金等價物和有價證券的損益，以及外匯衍生性商品收益以及與公司間借貸相關的損失。該公司由亨利福特於 1903 年 6 月 16 日創立，總部位於密西根州迪爾伯恩。

info.description: Cullinan Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the developing of oncology and immuno-oncology therapies. Its pipeline includes CLN-978, CLN-619, Zipalertinib CLN-081/TAS6417, CLN-049, and CLN-617. The company was founded by Patrick A. Baeuerle on September 15, 2016 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: Cullinan Therapeutics, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物製藥公司，從事腫瘤學和免疫腫瘤學療法的開發。其管路包括CLN-978、CLN-619、Zipalertinib CLN-081/TAS6417、CLN-049和CLN-617。該公司由 Patrick A. Baeuerle 於 2016 年 9 月 15 日創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: SI-BONE, Inc. is a medical device company, which engages in the provision of a proprietary minimally invasive surgical implant system to fuse the sacroiliac joint for treatment of musculoskeletal disorders of the sacropelvic anatomy. It offers a proprietary minimally invasive surgical implant system, called iFuse, used to fuse the sacroiliac joint to treat sacroiliac joint dysfunction that often causes severe lower back pain. The company was founded by Mark A. Reiley and Jeffrey W. Dunn on March 18, 2008 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA.
info.description_zh: SI-BONE, Inc. 是一家醫療器材公司，致力於提供專有的微創手術植入系統來融合骶髂關節，以治療骶骨盆解剖結構的肌肉骨骼疾病。它提供了一種專有的微創手術植入系統，稱為 iFuse，用於融合骶髂關節，以治療經常導致嚴重下背痛的骶髂關節功能障礙。該公司由 Mark A. Reiley 和 Jeffrey W. Dunn 於 2008 年 3 月 18 日創立，總部位於加州聖克拉拉。

info.description: NextNav, Inc. engages in development of positioning, navigation, and timing solutions. Its products include NextNav Pinnacle, NextNav 3D, and NextNav TerraPoiNT. The company was founded by Ganesh Pattabiraman and Arun Raghupathy in May 2021 and is headquartered in Reston, VA.
info.description_zh: NextNav, Inc. 從事定位、導航和授時解決方案的開發。其產品包括 NextNav Pinnacle、NextNav 3D 和 NextNav TerraPoiNT。該公司由 Ganesh Pattabiraman 和 Arun Raghupathy 於 2021 年 5 月創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州雷斯頓。

info.description: Versant Media Group, Inc. operates as an industry media and entertainment business that operates in four core markets: political news and opinion, business news and personal finance, golf and athletics participation and sports and genre entertainment. It also serves on markets primarily through a strong portfolio of brands consisting of renowned networks and complementary digital platforms. The company was founded on May 1, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Versant Media Group, Inc. 是一家行業媒體和娛樂企業，業務涉及四個核心市場：政治新聞和輿論、商業新聞和個人理財、高爾夫和田徑參與以及體育和流派娛樂。它也主要透過由知名網路和互補數位平台組成的強大品牌組合在市場上提供服務。該公司成立於2025年5月1日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Solana ETF seeks long-term capital appreciation. The fund is an ETF that seeks to achieve its investment objective primarily though managed exposure to SOL futures contracts that trade only on an exchange registered with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission, and cash, cash-like instruments or high quality securities that serve as collateral to the fund's investments in Solana futures contracts. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Solana ETF 尋求長期資本增值。該基金是一款 ETF，主要透過管理 SOL 期貨合約（僅在商品期貨交易委員會註冊的交易所交易）以及現金、類現金工具或高品質證券（作為基金 Solana 期貨合約投資的抵押品）來實現其投資目標。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Vertex Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a global biotechnology company, which engages in the business of discovering, developing, manufacturing, and commercializing small molecule drugs for patients with serious diseases. The firm focuses on development and commercializing therapies for the treatment of cystic fibrosis, infectious diseases including viral infections such as influenza and bacterial infections, autoimmune diseases such as rheumatoid arthritis, cancer, inflammatory bowel disease and neurological disorders including pain and multiple sclerosis. The company was founded by Joshua S. Boger in 1989 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.description_zh: Vertex Pharmaceuticals, Inc.是一家全球生技公司，從事為嚴重疾病患者發現、開發、製造和商業化小分子藥物的業務。該公司專注於開發和商業化用於治療囊性纖維化、傳染病（包括流感和細菌感染等病毒感染）、自體免疫疾病（如類風濕性關節炎、癌症、發炎性腸道疾病和神經系統疾病（包括疼痛和多發性硬化症））的療法。該公司由 Joshua S. Boger 於 1989 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: GoDaddy, Inc. engages in the provision of simple and easy-to-use products on a single technology platform wrapped with personalized guidance. It operates under the Applications and Commerce (A and C) and Core Platform (Core) segments. The A and C segment includes selling products containing proprietary software, commerce products, third-party email, productivity solutions, and certain products included in bundled offerings of proprietary software products. The Core segment includes domain registrations and renewals, aftermarket domain sales, website hosting products, website security products not included in bundled offerings of proprietary software, and products that do not contain a software component. The company was founded by Robert R. Parsons in 1997 and is headquartered in Tempe, AZ.
info.description_zh: GoDaddy, Inc. 致力於在單一技術平台上提供簡單易用的產品，並提供個人化指導。它在應用程式和商務（A 和 C）以及核心平台（核心）部門下運作。 A 和 C 部門包括銷售包含專有軟體的產品、商業產品、第三方電子郵件、生產力解決方案以及專有軟體產品捆綁產品中包含的某些產品。核心部分包括網域名稱註冊和續約、售後網域銷售、網站寄存產品、不包含在專有軟體捆綁產品中的網站安全產品以及不包含軟體元件的產品。該公司由 Robert R. Parsons 於 1997 年創立，總部位於亞利桑那州坦佩。

info.description: Sunrun, Inc. engages in the design, development, installation, sale, ownership, and maintenance of residential solar energy systems. It sells solar service offerings and installs solar energy systems for homeowners. Customers can access its products through three channels: direct-to-consumer, solar partnerships, and strategic partnerships. The company was founded by Edward Harris Fenster, Robert Nat Kreamer, and Lynn Michelle Jurich in January 2007 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Sunrun, Inc. 從事住宅太陽能係統的設計、開發、安裝、銷售、擁有和維護。它銷售太陽能服務產品並為房主安裝太陽能係統。客戶可以透過三種管道獲取其產品：直接面向消費者、太陽能合作夥伴關係和策略合作夥伴關係。該公司由 Edward Harris Fenster、Robert Nat Kreamer 和 Lynn Michelle Jurich 於 2007 年 1 月創立，總部位於加利福尼亞州舊金山。

info.description: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. engages in the provision of space for lease. It offers properties for rent to life science, agriculture technology (agtech), and technology tenants. The company was founded by Alan D. Gold, Gary A. Kreitzer, Joel S. Marcus, and Jerry M. Sudarsky in October 1994 and is headquartered in Pasadena, CA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 辦公室
info.description_zh: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. 從事提供租賃空間的業務。它為生命科學、農業技術 (agtech) 和技術租戶提供出租物業。該公司由 Alan D. Gold、Gary A. Kreitzer、Joel S. Marcus 和 Jerry M. Sudarsky 於 1994 年 10 月創立，總部位於加州帕薩迪納。

info.description: Personalis, Inc. engages in the provision of advanced genomic tests for cancer. The firm is also involved in providing sequencing and data analysis services to support population sequencing initiatives. The company was founded by Euan A. Ashley, Michael Snyder, Atul J. Butte, John S. West, and Russ B. Altman in February 2011 and is headquartered in Fremont, CA.
info.description_zh: Personalis, Inc. 致力於提供先進的癌症基因組測試。該公司還提供定序和數據分析服務，以支援群體定序計劃。該公司由 Euan A. Ashley、Michael Snyder、Atul J. Butte、John S. West 和 Russ B. Altman 於 2011 年 2 月創立，總部位於加州弗里蒙特。

info.description: Ondas, Inc. engages in the development, marketing, and sale of wireless radio systems for secure, wide area mission-critical business-to-business networks. It operates through the Ondas Networks and Ondas Autonomous Systems segments. The Ondas Networks segment provides wireless connectivity solutions enabling mission-critical Industrial Internet applications and services. The Ondas Autonomous Systems segment designs, develops, and markets commercial drone solutions via the Optimus System and Scout System. The company was founded on December 22, 2014 and is headquartered in West Palm Beach, FL.
info.description_zh: Ondas, Inc. 從事安全、廣域任務關鍵型企業對企業網路的無線電系統的開發、行銷和銷售。它透過 Ondas Networks 和 Ondas Autonomous Systems 部門運作。 Ondas Networks 部門提供無線連接解決方案，支援任務關鍵型工業互聯網應用和服務。 Ondas Autonomous Systems 部門透過 Optimus System 和 Scout System 設計、開發和銷售商用無人機解決方案。該公司成立於2014年12月22日，總部位於佛羅裡達州西棕櫚灘。

info.description: iShares MSCI China ETF seeks to track the investment results of the MSCI China Index. The fund generally will invest at least 80% of its assets in the component securities of the underlying index and in investments that have economic characteristics that are substantially identical to the component securities of the underlying index. The index is a free float-adjusted market capitalization-weighted index that is designed to measure the performance of equity securities in the top 85% in market capitalization of the Chinese equity securities markets, as represented by the H-shares and B-shares markets. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: iShares MSCI 中國 ETF 旨在追蹤 MSCI 中國指數的投資結果。該基金通常將至少 80% 的資產投資於標的指數的組成證券以及具有與標的指數的組成證券基本相同的經濟特徵的投資。該指數是自由流通量調整後的市值加權指數，旨在衡量以H股和B股市場為代表的中國權益類證券市場市值排名前85%的權益類證券的表現。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Halozyme Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical technology platform company. It engages in developing, manufacturing, and commercializing drug-device combination products using advanced auto-injector technology that are designed to provide commercial or functional advantages such as improved convenience and tolerability, and enhanced patient comfort and adherence. The company was founded by Gregory Ian Frost on February 26, 1998 and is headquartered in San Diego, CA.
info.description_zh: Halozyme Therapeutics, Inc.是一家生物製藥技術平台公司。該公司致力於使用先進的自動注射器技術開發、製造和商業化藥物器材組合產品，這些產品旨在提供商業或功能優勢，例如提高便利性和耐受性，並提高患者舒適度和依從性。該公司由 Gregory Ian Frost 於 1998 年 2 月 26 日創立，總部位於加州聖地牙哥。

info.description: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long AVGO ETF seeks daily leveraged investment results of two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of Broadcom Inc. (Nasdaq: AVGO) (the "Underlying Security" or "AVGO"). The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund ("ETF") that attempts to achieve two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of the underlying security by entering into swap agreements on the underlying security. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long AVGO ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果為 Broadcom Inc.（納斯達克股票代碼：AVGO）（「基礎證券」或「AVGO」）股價每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金是一種主動管理的交易所交易基金（「ETF」），試圖透過簽訂基礎證券掉期協議來實現基礎證券股價每日百分比變化的兩倍（200%）。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: QuantumScape Corp. engages in developing next-generation solid-state lithium-metal batteries. The company's next-generation batteries are designed to enable greater energy density, faster charging, and enhanced safety to support the transition away from legacy energy sources toward a lower-carbon future. The company was founded by Jagdeep Singh, Tim Holme, and Fritz B. Prinz in May 2010 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: QuantumScape Corp. 致力於開發新一代固態鋰金屬電池。該公司的下一代電池旨在實現更高的能量密度、更快的充電速度和更高的安全性，以支持從傳統能源向低碳未來的過渡。該公司由 Jagdeep Singh、Tim Holme 和 Fritz B. Prinz 於 2010 年 5 月創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: 2x Solana ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, that correspond to two times (2x) the daily performance of SOL. The fund is an ETF that seeks to achieve its investment objective primarily through managed exposure to SOL futures contracts that trade only on an exchange registered with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission, and cash, cash-like instruments or high-quality securities that serve as collateral to the fund's investments in Solana futures contracts. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 2x Solana ETF 尋求扣除費用和開支之前的每日投資結果，相當於 SOL 每日表現的兩倍 (2x)。該基金是一款 ETF，主要透過管理 SOL 期貨合約（僅在商品期貨交易委員會註冊的交易所進行交易）以及作為基金 Solana 期貨合約投資抵押品的現金、類現金工具或高品質證券來實現其投資目標。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Immersion Corp. engages in the creation, design, development and licensing of patented haptic innovations and software. The firm offers touch sense platform and design services. It focuses on the following target application areas: mobile devices, wearable, consumer, mobile entertainment and other content, console gaming, automotive, medical, and commercial. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Aventura, FL.
info.description_zh: Immersion Corp. 從事專利觸覺創新和軟體的創造、設計、開發和授權。該公司提供觸控感測平台和設計服務。它專注於以下目標應用領域：行動裝置、穿戴式裝置、消費者、行動娛樂和其他內容、主機遊戲、汽車、醫療和商業。該公司成立於 1993 年，總部位於佛羅裡達州阿文圖拉。

info.description: SSR Mining, Inc. is a metals mining company with assets located in four jurisdictions: the USA, Turkiye, Canada, and Argentina, which engages in the operation, acquisition, exploration and development of precious metal resource properties. The firm produces gold ore as well as copper, silver, lead and zinc concentrates. It operates through the following business segments: Copler, Marigold, Crippler Creek and Victor, Seabee and Puna. The company was founded on December 11, 1946 and is headquartered in Denver, CO.
info.description_zh: SSR Mining, Inc.是一家金屬礦業公司，資產分佈於美國、土耳其、加拿大和阿根廷四個司法管轄區，從事貴金屬資源資產的營運、收購、勘探和開發。該公司生產金礦石以及銅、銀、鉛和鋅精礦。該公司透過以下業務部門營運：Copler、Marigold、Crippler Creek 和 Victor、Seabee 和 Puna。該公司成立於 1946 年 12 月 11 日，總部位於科羅拉多州丹佛市。

info.description: PROCEPT BioRobotics Corp. is a commercial-stage surgical robotics company, which engages in the development of transformative solutions in urology. It manufactures and sells the AquaBeam Robotic System, an image-guided, surgical robotic system for use in minimally invasive urologic surgery, with an initial focus on treating BPH. The firm's proprietary AquaBeam Robotic System employs a single-use disposable handpiece to deliver its Aquablation therapy, which combines real-time, multidimensional imaging, personalized treatment planning, automated robotics and heat-free waterjet ablation for targeted and rapid removal of prostate tissue. The company was founded by Nikolai Aljuri and Rodney C. Perkins in 2007 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: PROCEPT BioRobotics Corp. 是一家商業階段的手術機器人公司，致力於泌尿外科變革性解決方案的開發。該公司生產和銷售 AquaBeam 機器人系統，這是一種影像引導的手術機器人系統，用於微創泌尿外科手術，最初的重點是治療 BPH。該公司專有的 AquaBeam 機器人系統採用一次性手機進行 Aquablation 治療，該治療結合了即時、多維成像、個人化治療計劃、自動化機器人技術和無熱水射流消融，可針對性地快速去除前列腺組織。該公司由 Nikolai Aljuri 和 Rodney C. Perkins 於 2007 年創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: Moderna, Inc. engages in the development of transformative medicines based on messenger ribonucleic acid. The firm's product pipeline includes the following modalities: prophylactic vaccines, cancer vaccines, intratumoral immuno-oncology, localized regenerative therapeutics, systemic secreted therapeutics, inhaled pulmonary therapeutics and systemic intracellular therapeutics. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States, Europe, and Rest of World. The company was founded by Noubar B. Afeyan, Robert S. Langer, Jr., Derrick J. Rossi, and Kenneth R. Chien in 2010 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: Moderna, Inc. 致力於開發基於信使核糖核酸的轉化藥物。該公司的產品線包括以下模式：預防性疫苗、癌症疫苗、腫瘤內免疫腫瘤學、局部再生療法、全身性分泌療法、吸入性肺部療法和全身性細胞內療法。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、歐洲和世界其他地區。該公司由 Noubar B. Afeyan、Robert S. Langer, Jr.、Derrick J. Rossi 和 Kenneth R. Chien 於 2010 年創立，總部位於麻薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: nLIGHT, Inc. engages in the provision of semiconductor and fiber lasers for aerospace and defense, industrial, and microfabrication applications. It operates through the Laser Products and Advanced Development segments. The Laser Products segment designs, manufactures, and sells a range of semiconductor lasers and fiber lasers that are typically integrated into laser systems or manufacturing tools built by customers. The Advanced Development segment focuses on research, design, and prototyping of next-generation laser technologies, leveraging expertise in laser technology, development, beam control, and advanced optics. The company was founded by Scott H. Keeney, Mark DeVito, and Jason Farmer in June 2000 and is headquartered in Camas, WA.
info.description_zh: nLIGHT, Inc. 致力於為航空航天和國防、工業和微加工應用提供半導體和光纖雷射。它透過雷射產品和高級開發部門運作。雷射產品部門設計、製造和銷售一系列半導體雷射和光纖雷射器，這些雷射通常整合到客戶建造的雷射系統或製造工具中。高級開發部門專注於下一代雷射技術的研究、設計和原型製作，利用雷射技術、開發、光束控制和先進光學的專業知識。該公司由 Scott H. Keeney、Mark DeVito 和 Jason Farmer 於 2000 年 6 月創立，總部位於華盛頓州卡馬斯。

info.description: Velo3D, Inc. operates as a technology company, which engages in developing and manufacturing metal laser sintering printing machines for 3D printing. Its products include assure system, flow software, sapphire printer & sapphire XC. The company was founded by Benyamin Buller in June 2014 and is headquartered in Fremont, CA.
info.description_zh: Velo3D, Inc.是一家科技公司，致力於開發和製造用於3D列印的金屬雷射燒結印表機。其產品包括保固系統、流程軟體、藍寶石印表機和藍寶石XC。該公司由 Benyamin Buller 於 2014 年 6 月創立，總部位於加州弗里蒙特。

info.description: Santacruz Silver Mining Ltd. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. It operates through the following segments: Bolivar, Porco, Caballo Blanco Group, San Lucas Group, Zimapan, and Corporate and Other. The Bolivar segment focuses on mine and processing plants. The Porco segment is invovled in mine and processing plants. The Caballo Blanco Group segment includes the Tres Amigos, Colquechaquita mines and the Don Diego processing plant. The San Lucas Group segment refers to Reserva mine and San Lucas feed sourcing business. The Zimapan segment consists of mine and processing plant. The company was founded on January 24, 2011 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
info.description_zh: Santacruz Silver Mining Ltd. 從事礦產收購、勘探和開發。該公司透過以下部門營運：Bolivar、Porco、Caballo Blanco Group、San Lucas Group、Zimapan 以及 Corporate and Other。玻利瓦爾部門專注於礦山和加工廠。 Porco 部門涉及礦山和加工廠。 Caballo Blanco 集團部門包括 Tres Amigos、Colquechaquita 礦場和 Don Diego 加工廠。聖盧卡斯集團部門涉及珍藏礦和聖盧卡斯飼料採購業務。 Zimapan 部門由礦場和加工廠組成。該公司成立於2011年1月24日，總部位於加拿大溫哥華。

info.description: Kingsoft Cloud Holdings Ltd. provides cloud storage and cloud computation services. It offers cloud platform consisting of cloud infrastructure, cutting-edge cloud products and architected industry-specific solutions across public cloud, enterprise cloud and AIoT cloud services. The firm's products include computing, networking, storage & CDN, database, data analysis and security. It offers medical & healthcare solutions, supply chain finance solutions, e-government solutions, internet of vehicles solutions, media cloud solutions, big data education & training solutions, cloud integrated service and cloud gaming service. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
info.description_zh: 金山雲控股有限公司提供雲端儲存和雲端運算服務。它提供由雲端基礎設施、尖端雲產品和跨公有雲、企業雲和AIoT雲服務的特定產業解決方案組成的雲端平台。該公司的產品包括運算、網路、儲存和 CDN、資料庫、資料分析和安全性。提供醫療健康解決方案、供應鏈金融解決方案、電子化政府解決方案、車聯網解決方案、媒體雲端解決方案、大數據教育培訓解決方案、雲端綜合服務和雲端遊戲服務。公司成立於2012年，總部位於中國北京。

info.description: Hycroft Mining Holding Corp. engages in the exploration, mining, and development of gold and silver properties. The company was founded on August 28, 2017 and is headquartered in Winnemucca, NV.
info.description_zh: Hycroft Mining Holding Corp. 從事金銀礦產的勘探、開採和開發。該公司成立於2017年8月28日，總部位於內華達州溫尼馬卡。

info.description: Replimune Group, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company. It engages in the business of developing oncolytic immunotherapies for the treatment of cancer. The company was founded by Philip Astley-Sparke, Colin A. Love, and Robert Coffin in March 2015 and is headquartered in Woburn, MA.
info.description_zh: Replimune Group, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生技公司。它從事開髮用於治療癌症的溶瘤免疫療法的業務。該公司由 Philip Astley-Sparke、Colin A. Love 和 Robert Coffin 於 2015 年 3 月創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州沃本。

info.description: Figure Technology Solutions, Inc. is a blockchain-native capital marketplace, which engages in connecting origination, funding, and secondary market activity. It operates through the following segments: FTI, Markets, and Other. The FTI segment offers Figure Connect which generates ecosystem and technology fees, and originates, sells, and securitizes home equity line of credit (HELOC) loans that it services. The Markets segment utilizes blockchain technology to develop an exchange for digital assets and credit, with new product offerings including providing interest-bearing stable coin deposits. The company was founded by Michael Scott Cagney and June Ou in 2018 and is headquartered in Reno, NV.
info.description_zh: Figure Technology Solutions, Inc. 是一個區塊鏈原生資本市場，致力於連結發起、融資和二級市場活動。它透過以下部門運作：FTI、市場和其他部門。 FTI 部門提供Figure Connect，該產品產生生態系統和技術費用，並發起、銷售和證券化其服務的房屋淨值信貸額度 (HELOC) 貸款。市場部門利用區塊鏈技術開發數位資產和信用交易，提供新產品，包括提供計息穩定幣存款。該公司由 Michael Scott Cagney 和 June Ou 於 2018 年創立，總部位於內華達州里諾。

info.description: SELLAS Life Sciences Group, Inc. is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development and commercialization of immunotherapeutic for cancer indications. Its product pipeline includes galinpepimut-S. The company was founded by Angelos M. Stergiou on April 3, 2006 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: SELLAS Life Sciences Group, Inc.是一家臨床階段生物製藥公司，致力於癌症適應症免疫療法的開發和商業化。其產品線包括galinpepimut-S。該公司由 Angelos M. Stergiou 於 2006 年 4 月 3 日創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: NextDecade Corp. is a development company, which focuses on liquefied natural gas (LNG) export projects and associated pipelines. It develops and manages land-based and floating liquefied natural gas projects in the Gulf Coast with focus on the Rio Grande LNG. The company was founded by Kathleen Eishbrenner in 2010 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣設備與服務
info.description_zh: NextDecade Corp. 是一家開發公司，專注於液化天然氣 (LNG) 出口項目及相關管道。該公司在墨西哥灣沿岸開發和管理陸基和浮式液化天然氣項目，並專注於格蘭德河液化天然氣項目。該公司由 Kathleen Eishbrenner 於 2010 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: The Williams Cos., Inc. operates as an energy infrastructure company, which explores, produces, transports, sells and processes natural gas and petroleum products. It operates through the following segments: Transmission and Gulf of Mexico, Northeast G&P, and West. The Transmission and Gulf of Mexico segment consists of interstate natural gas pipelines, the Transco and Northwest Pipelines, as well as natural gas gathering and processing and crude oil production handling and transportation assets in the Gulf Coast region. The Northeast G&P segment includes midstream gathering, processing, and fractionation businesses in the Marcellus Shale region primarily in Pennsylvania and New York, and the Utica Shale region of eastern Ohio. The West segment consists of gas gathering, processing, and treating operations in the Rocky Mountain region of Colorado and Wyoming, the Barnett Shale region of north-central Texas, the Eagle Ford Shale region of south Texas, the Haynesville Shale region of northwest Louisiana, and the Mid-Continent region which includes the Anadarko, Arkoma, and Permian basins. The company was founded by David Williams and Miller Williams in 1908 and is headquartered in Tulsa, OK.
info.description_zh: Williams Cos., Inc. 是一家能源基礎設施公司，從事天然氣和石油產品的勘探、生產、運輸、銷售和加工。該公司透過以下部門運作：傳輸和墨西哥灣部門、東北 G&P 部門和西部部門。傳輸和墨西哥灣部分包括州際天然氣管道、Transco 和西北管道，以及墨西哥灣沿岸地區的天然氣收集和加工以及原油生產處理和運輸資產。 Northeast G&P 部門包括主要位於賓夕法尼亞州和紐約州的馬塞勒斯頁岩地區以及俄亥俄州東部的尤蒂卡頁岩地區的中游收集、加工和分餾業務。西段包括科羅拉多州和懷俄明州落基山地區、德克薩斯州中北部巴尼特頁岩地區、德克薩斯州南部伊格爾福特頁岩地區、路易斯安那州西北部海恩斯維爾頁岩地區以及包括阿納達科盆地、阿科馬盆地和二疊紀盆地在內的中大陸地區的天然氣收集、加工和處理業務。該公司由 David Williams 和 Miller Williams 於 1908 年創立，總部位於俄克拉荷馬州塔爾薩。

info.description: CME Group, Inc. operates a derivatives marketplace, which offers a range of futures and options products for risk management. Its exchanges offer a range of global benchmark products across all major asset classes based on interest rates, equity indexes, foreign exchange (FX), energy, agricultural commodities and metals. It offers futures and options on futures trading across asset classes through the CME Globex platform, fixed income trading via BrokerTec and FX trading on the EBS platform. In addition, it also operates CME Clearing, a central counterparty clearing provider. The company was founded in 1898 and is headquartered in Chicago, IL.
info.industry_zh: 財務數據和證券交易所
info.description_zh: CME Group, Inc. 經營一個衍生性商品市場，提供一系列用於風險管理的期貨和選擇權產品。其交易所提供一系列基於利率、股票指數、外匯（FX）、能源、農產品和金屬的全球基準產品，涵蓋所有主要資產類別。它透過 CME Globex 平台提供跨資產類別的期貨和期貨選擇權交易，透過 BrokerTec 提供固定收益交易，並在 EBS 平台上提供外匯交易。此外，它還營運中央對手方清算提供者CME Clearing。該公司成立於 1898 年，總部位於伊利諾州芝加哥。

info.description: Kinder Morgan, Inc. engages in providing pipeline transportation of natural gas services. It operates through the following business segments: Natural Gas Pipelines, Products Pipelines, Terminals, and CO2. The Natural Gas Pipelines segment operates major interstate and intrastate natural gas pipelines and storage systems. The Products Pipelines segment is involved in the operation of refined petroleum products, crude oil, and condensate pipelines. The Terminals segment includes the operation of liquids and bulk terminal facilities that store and handle various commodities. The CO2 segment produces, transports, and markets to oil fields that use CO2 as a flooding medium to increase recovery and production of crude oil from mature oil fields. The company was founded by Richard D. Kinder and William V. Morgan in February 1997 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: Kinder Morgan, Inc. 從事提供天然氣管道運輸服務。它透過以下業務部門運作：天然氣管道、產品管道、碼頭和二氧化碳。天然氣管道部門運作主要的州際和州內天然氣管道和儲存系統。產品管道部門從事成品油、原油和凝析油管道的營運。碼頭部門包括經營儲存和處理各種商品的液體和散裝碼頭設施。二氧化碳部門生產、運輸並向使用二氧化碳作為驅油介質的油田銷售，以提高成熟油田原油的採收率和產量。該公司由 Richard D. Kinder 和 William V. Morgan 於 1997 年 2 月創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: First Trust Nasdaq Oil & Gas ETF seeks investment results that correspond generally to the price and yield (before the fund's fees and expenses) of the Nasdaq US Smart Oil & Gas IndexTM. The fund will normally invest at least 90% of its net assets (including investment borrowings) in the common stocks and depository receipts that comprise the index. The index is designed to provide exposure to U.S. companies comprising the oil and gas sector that have been selected based upon their liquidity and weighted based upon their cumulative score on three investing factors: volatility, value and growth. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: First Trust 納斯達克石油和天然氣 ETF 尋求與納斯達克美國智慧石油和天然氣指數™ 的價格和收益率（未計基金費用和開支）相對應的投資結果。該基金通常將至少 90% 的淨資產（包括投資借款）投資於構成該指數的普通股和存託憑證。該指數旨在提供對包括石油和天然氣行業在內的美國公司的投資，這些公司是根據其流動性進行選擇的，並根據其在三個投資因素（波動性、價值和增長）的累積得分進行加權。它是非多元化的。

info.description: Gemini Space Station, Inc. is a holding company, which offers a mobile and web based crypto asset exchange platform, proprietary wallet infrastructure and custody solutions, over-the-counter trading solutions tailored to institutions and professionals, a digital art auction platform, a proprietary United States dollar backed stablecoin, and a credit card product that offers crypto asset rewards on customer purchases. The company was founded by Tyler Winklevoss and Cameron Winklevoss in 2014 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Gemini Space Station, Inc. 是一家控股公司，提供基於行動和網路的加密資產交易平台、專有的錢包基礎設施和託管解決方案、為機構和專業人士量身定制的場外交易解決方案、數位藝術品拍賣平台、專有的美元支援的穩定幣以及為客戶購買提供加密資產獎勵的信用卡產品。該公司由 Tyler Winklevoss 和 Cameron Winklevoss 於 2014 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Prudential Financial, Inc. engages in the provision of insurance, investment management, and other financial products and services. It operates through the following segments: Prudential Investment Management, Inc. (PGIM), U.S. Businesses, International Businesses, and Corporate and Others. The PGIM segment is involved in the provision of investment management services and solutions related to public fixed income, public equity, real estate debt and equity, private credit and other alternatives, and multi-asset class strategies. The U.S. Businesses segment includes retirement strategies, group insurance, and individual life. The International Businesses segment focuses on investing in existing businesses and assessing acquisition opportunities. The Corporate and Other Operations segment relates to the corporate items and initiatives not allocated to business segments. The company was founded by John Fairfield Dryden in 1875 and is headquartered in Newark, NJ.
info.description_zh: Prudential Financial, Inc. 從事提供保險、投資管理以及其他金融產品和服務。該公司透過以下部門運作：保德信投資管理公司 (PGIM)、美國業務部門、國際業務部門以及企業及其他部門。 PGIM部門提供與公共固定收益、公共股權、房地產債務和股權、私人信貸和其他另類投資以及多資產類別策略相關的投資管理服務和解決方案。美國業務部門包括退休策略、團體保險和個人人壽保險。國際業務部門專注於投資現有業務和評估收購機會。公司和其他業務部門涉及未分配給業務部門的公司項目和計劃。該公司由 John Fairfield Dryden 於 1875 年創立，總部位於新澤西州紐瓦克。

info.description: Welltower, Inc. is a health care infrastructure company, which engages in seniors housing operations, post-acute providers and health systems to fund the real estate infrastructure. The company's operating business segments include Seniors Housing Operating, Triple-Net, and Outpatient Medical. The Seniors Housing Operating segment operates properties including seniors apartments, independent living and independent supportive living, continuing care retirement communities, and assisted living, Alzheimer's dementia care and includes care homes with or without nursing. The Triple-Net segment properties offer services including independent living & supportive living (Canada), assisted living, continuing care retirement communities, Alzheimer's/dementia care and care homes with or without nursing (U.K.), and long-term/post-acute care. The Outpatient Medical segment invests in and operates outpatient medical buildings including physician offices, ambulatory surgery centers, diagnostic facilities, outpatient services and/or labs. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Toledo, OH.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 醫療保健設施
info.description_zh: Welltower, Inc. 是一家醫療保健基礎設施公司，從事老年人住房運營、急性期後醫療服務提供者和醫療系統，為房地產基礎設施提供資金。該公司的營運業務包括老年人住房運營、三網和門診醫療。老年人住房運營部門經營的物業包括老年人公寓、獨立生活和獨立支持性生活、持續護理退休社區、輔助生活、阿茲海默症癡呆護理，包括有或沒有護理的護理院。 Triple-Net 部門提供的服務包括獨立生活和支持性生活（加拿大）、輔助生活、持續照護退休社區、阿茲海默症/失智症照護和有或沒有照護的照護機構（英國）以及長期/急性期後照護。門診醫療部門投資並營運門診醫療建築，包括醫生辦公室、門診手術中心、診斷設施、門診服務和/或實驗室。該公司成立於 1970 年，總部位於俄亥俄州托萊多。

info.description: Astronics Corp. engages in the provision of electrical power generation and distribution systems. It includes motion systems, lighting and safety systems, avionics products, aircraft structures, systems certification, and automated test systems. It operates through the Aerospace and Test Systems segments. The Aerospace segment designs and manufactures products for the global aerospace industry. The Test Systems segment designs, develops, manufactures and maintains communications and weapons test systems and training and simulation devices for military applications. The firm's products and solutions include Aircraft Data Systems, Aircraft Electrical Power Systems, Airfield Lighting, Custom Design & Manufacturing, Emergency Systems, Enhanced Vision Systems, IFC Antennas and Radome Systems, Inflight Entertainment System Hardware, Interiors & Structures, Lighting Systems, Seat Actuation Systems, Simulation & Training, Systems Certification, Test & Measurement and VIP IFEC & CMS Systems. The company was founded on December 5th, 1968 and is headquartered in East Aurora, NY.
info.description_zh: Astronics Corp. 從事提供發電和配電系統。它包括運動系統、照明和安全系統、航空電子產品、飛機結構、系統認證和自動化測試系統。它透過航空航天和測試系統部門運作。航空航天部門為全球航空航天工業設計和製造產品。測試系統部門設計、開發、製造和維護通訊和武器測試系統以及軍事應用的訓練和模擬設備。該公司的產品和解決方案包括飛機數據系統、飛機電力系統、機場照明、客製化設計和製造、緊急系統、增強視覺系統、IFC 天線和天線罩系統、機上娛樂系統硬體、內飾和結構、照明系統、座椅驅動系統、模擬和培訓、系統認證、測試和測量以及 VIP IFEC 和 CMS 系統。該公司成立於 1968 年 12 月 5 日，總部位於紐約州東奧羅拉。

info.description: UroGen Pharma Ltd. is a biopharmaceutical company, which engages in developing and commercializing innovative solutions that treat urothelial and specialty cancers. It also focuses on developing RTGel reverse-thermal hydrogel, a proprietary sustained release and hydrogel-based platform technology. The company was founded by Asher Holzer in 2004 and is headquartered in Princeton, NJ.
info.description_zh: UroGen Pharma Ltd. 是一家生物製藥公司，致力於開發和商業化治療尿路上皮癌和特殊癌症的創新解決方案。它還專注於開發 RTGel 逆熱水凝膠，這是一種專有的持續釋放和基於水凝膠的平台技術。該公司由 Asher Holzer 於 2004 年創立，總部位於新澤西州普林斯頓。

info.description: Paylocity Holding Corp. engages in the development and provision of cloud-based software solutions. It offers cloud-based payroll, human capital management applications, time labor tracking, benefits administration, and talent management. The company was founded by Steve I. Sarowitz in 1997 and is headquartered in Schaumburg, IL.
info.description_zh: Paylocity Holding Corp. 從事開發和提供基於雲端的軟體解決方案。它提供基於雲端的薪資、人力資本管理應用程式、時間勞動力追蹤、福利管理和人才管理。該公司由 Steve I. Sarowitz 於 1997 年創立，總部位於伊利諾伊州紹姆堡。

info.description: Xiao-I Corp. is a holding company, which engages in Internet technology development through its subsidiaries. It focuses on business solutions and services in artificial intelligence, covering natural language processing, voice and image recognition, machine learning, and affective computing. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
info.description_zh: 小i公司是一家控股公司，透過其子公司從事網路技術開發。專注於人工智慧領域的商業解決方案和服務，涵蓋自然語言處理、語音和圖像識別、機器學習、情感計算等。公司成立於2001年，總部位於中國上海。

info.description: Kanzhun Ltd. engages in the provision of online recruitment services. It also offers value-added tools to job seekers. The company was founded by Peng Zhao on January 16, 2014 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
info.description_zh: 看準有限公司從事提供線上招聘服務。它還為求職者提供增值工具。該公司由趙鵬於2014年1月16日創立，總部位於中國北京。

info.description: Guardant Health, Inc. is a precision oncology company, which engages in the provision of treatment of cancer through the use of proprietary blood-based tests, vast data sets, and advanced analytics. Its solutions include treatment selection, recurrence detection, and early detection. The company was founded by Helmy Eltoukhy, AmirAli H. Talasaz, and Michael Joseph Wiley in December 2011 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.
info.description_zh: Guardant Health, Inc. 是一家精準腫瘤學公司，透過使用專有的血液檢查、大量數據集和高級分析來提供癌症治療。其解決方案包括治療選擇、復發檢測和早期檢測。該公司由 Helmy Eltoukhy、AmirAli H. Talasaz 和 Michael Joseph Wiley 於 2011 年 12 月創立，總部位於加州帕洛阿爾托。

info.description: Pangaea Logistics Solutions Ltd. engages in the provision of seaborne dry bulk logistics and transportation services to industrial customers worldwide. It provides services to customers that require transportation of dry bulk cargoes, including grains, coal, iron ore, pig iron, hot briquetted iron, bauxite, alumina, cement clinker, dolomite, and limestone. The company was founded by Edward Coll, Carl Claus Boggild, and Anthony Laura in 1996 and is headquartered in Newport, RI.
info.description_zh: Pangea Logistics Solutions Ltd. 致力於為全球工業客戶提供海運乾散貨物流和運輸服務。它為需要運輸乾散貨的客戶提供服務，包括穀物、煤炭、鐵礦石、生鐵、熱壓鐵、鋁土礦、氧化鋁、水泥熟料、白雲石和石灰石。該公司由 Edward Coll、Carl Claus Boggild 和 Anthony Laura 於 1996 年創立，總部位於羅德島州紐波特。

info.description: VNET Group, Inc. operates as a carrier- and cloud-neutral internet data center services provider in China. It provides hosting and related services, including IDC services, cloud services, and business VPN services, to improve the reliability, security, and speed of its customers' internet infrastructure. The firm serves numerous industries, ranging from internet companies to government entities, blue-chip enterprises to small- and mid-sized enterprises. VNET Group was founded by Sheng Chen and Jun Zhang in 1999 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
info.description_zh: VNET Group, Inc. 在中國作為營運商和雲端中立的互聯網資料中心服務供應商運營。它提供託管和相關服務，包括IDC服務、雲端服務和企業VPN服務，以提高客戶互聯網基礎設施的可靠性、安全性和速度。該公司服務於眾多產業，從網路公司到政府實體、藍籌企業到中小企業。互聯星空集團由陳勝和張軍於1999年創立，總部位於中國北京。

info.description: Vor Biopharma, Inc. engages in developing cell therapies for treating cancer. It is a clinical-stage cell therapy company that combines a novel patient engineering approach with therapies to provide a single company solution for patients suffering from hematological malignancies. The company was founded by Aleks Radovic-Moreno and Siddhartha Mukherjee on December 30, 2015 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.description_zh: Vor Biopharma, Inc. 致力於開發治療癌症的細胞療法。它是一家臨床階段的細胞治療公司，將新穎的患者工程方法與療法相結合，為患有血液惡性腫瘤的患者提供單一公司的解決方案。該公司由 Aleks Radovic-Moreno 和 Siddhartha Mukherjee 於 2015 年 12 月 30 日創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long RKLB ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of Rocket Lab USA, Inc. The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund ("ETF") that attempts to achieve two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of the underlying security by employing derivatives, namely swap agreements and/or listed options contracts. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long RKLB ETF 在尋求扣除費用和開支之前，Rocket Lab USA, Inc. 股價每日百分比變化兩倍 (200%) 的每日投資結果。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金 (“ETF”)，試圖透過採用衍生性商品，即掉期協議和/或上市選擇權合約，實現標的證券股價每日百分比變化兩倍 (200%) 的結果。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Aeva Technologies, Inc. develops sensing paradigm for autonomous vehicles and robotics. The firm offers drones, robotics, vehicle technology, and virtual and augmented reality products. The company was founded by Soroush Salehian Dardashti and Mina Rezk in 2017 and is headquartered in Mountain View, CA.
info.description_zh: Aeva Technologies, Inc. 為自動駕駛車輛和機器人開發感測範例。該公司提供無人機、機器人、車輛技術以及虛擬和擴增實境產品。該公司由 Soroush Salehian Dardashti 和 Mina Rezk 於 2017 年創立，總部位於加州山景城。

info.description: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. engages in the business of acquiring, financing, and owning real estate property. The company was founded on May 10, 2010 and is headquartered in Tustin, CA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 醫療保健設施
info.description_zh: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. 從事收購、融資和擁有房地產業務。該公司成立於2010年5月10日，總部位於加州塔斯汀。

info.description: SailPoint, Inc. engages in the provision of a comprehensive identity security platform for the enterprise. Its solutions enable organizations to establish, control, and automate policies that help them define and maintain a robust security posture and achieve regulatory compliance. The company was founded by Mark David McClain in 2005 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: SailPoint, Inc. 致力於為企業提供全面的身份安全平台。其解決方案使組織能夠建立、控制和自動化策略，幫助他們定義和維護強大的安全態勢並實現法規遵循。該公司由 Mark David McClain 於 2005 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: Freeport-McMoRan, Inc. engages in the mining of copper, gold, and molybdenum. It operates through the following segments: U.S. Copper Mines, South America Operations, Indonesia Operations, Molybdenum Mines, U.S. Rod and Refining, Atlantic Copper, and Corporate and Other. The U.S. Copper Mines segment operates open-pit copper mines in Morenci, Bagdad, Safford, Sierrita, Miami in Arizona and Chino, and Tyrone in New Mexico. The South America Operations segment includes Cerro Verde in Peru and El Abra in Chile. The Indonesia Operations segment handles the operations of the Grasberg minerals district that produce copper concentrate containing significant quantities of gold and silver. The Molybdenum Mines segment includes the Henderson underground mine and Climax open pit mine, both in Colorado. The U.S. Rod and Refining segment consists of copper conversion facilities located in North America and includes refinery and rod mills. The Atlantic Copper segment smelts and refines copper concentrate and markets refined copper and precious metals in slimes. The Corporate and Other segment offers other mining and eliminations, oil and gas operations, and other corporate and elimination items. The company was founded by James R. Moffett on November 10, 1987, and is headquartered in Phoenix, AZ.
info.description_zh: Freeport-McMoRan, Inc. 從事銅、金和鉬的開採。該公司透過以下部門運作：美國銅礦部門、南美業務部門、印尼業務部門、鉬礦部門、美國棒材和精煉部門、大西洋銅業部門以及企業及其他部門。美國銅礦部門在亞利桑那州的莫倫西、巴格達、薩福德、謝里塔、邁阿密和新墨西哥州的奇諾和蒂龍經營露天銅礦。南美洲業務部門包括秘魯的Cerro Verde 和智利的El Abra。印尼業務部門負責格拉斯伯格礦區的業務，該礦區生產含有大量金和銀的銅精礦。鉬礦部門包括位於科羅拉多州的亨德森地下礦和 Climax 露天礦場。美國棒材和精煉部門由位於北美的銅轉化設施組成，包括精煉廠和棒材軋鋼機。大西洋銅業部門冶煉和精煉銅精礦，並銷售精煉銅和礦泥中的貴金屬。公司及其他部門提供其他採礦和消除、石油和天然氣業務以及其他公司和消除項目。該公司由 James R. Moffett 於 1987 年 11 月 10 日創立，總部位於亞利桑那州菲尼克斯。

info.description: PTC Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company, which focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialization of clinically differentiated medicines that provide benefits to patients with rare disorders. The company was founded by Allan Steven Jacobson and Stuart Walter Peltz on March 31, 1998 and is headquartered in Warren, NJ.
info.description_zh: PTC Therapeutics, Inc.是一家生物製藥公司，專注於臨床差異化藥物的發現、開發和商業化，為罕見疾病患者帶來益處。該公司由 Allan Steven Jacobson 和 Stuart Walter Peltz 於 1998 年 3 月 31 日創立，總部位於新澤西州沃倫。

info.description: Corpay, Inc. engages in the provision of digital payment solutions that enable businesses to control purchases and make payments. It operates through the following segments: Vehicle Payments, Corporate Payments, Lodging Payments and Other. The Vehicle Payments segment helps, controls and monitors spending and includes fuel card offerings, tolls and other complementary products. The Corporate Payments segment simplifies and automates vendor payments and includes accounts payable (AP) automation, virtual cards, cross-border payments and purchasing and travel and entertainment (T&E) card products. The Lodging Payments segment helps businesses manage lodging costs, while simplifying the management of hotels and housing, both short and longer-term, while also providing traveler and end customer support. The Other segment includes gift solutions and payroll card solution. It also operates through the following geographical segments: U.S., Brazil and the United Kingdom. The company was founded by William Boatner Reily III and Ronald F. Clarke in 1985 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: Corpay, Inc. 致力於提供數位支付解決方案，使企業能夠控制購買和付款。它透過以下部門運作：車輛付款、公司付款、住宿付款和其他。車輛支付部門幫助、控制和監控支出，包括加油卡產品、通行費和其他補充產品。企業支付部門簡化和自動化供應商付款，包括應付帳款 (AP) 自動化、虛擬卡、跨境支付以及採購、旅行和娛樂 (T&E) 卡產品。住宿支付部門幫助企業管理住宿成本，同時簡化短期和長期飯店和住房的管理，同時也為旅客和最終客戶提供支援。其他部分包括禮品解決方案和工資卡解決方案。它還透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、巴西和英國。該公司由 William Boatner Reily III 和 Ronald F. Clarke 於 1985 年創立，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。
